maketopo.py.html   
 Source file:   maketopo.py
 Directory:   /home/axel/Desktop/PDM/TriftGeoClaw/test
 Converted:   Mon Sep 16 2024 at 16:31:36   using clawcode2html
 This documentation file will not reflect any later changes in the source file. 

 
n = 50
xmin = -1.5
xmax = 1.5
ymin = -1.5
ymax = 1.5
sea_level = 0.

if __name__ == "__main__":
  from matplotlib import pyplot as plt
  import numpy as np

  # (progressing from upper left corner across rows, then down)
  x, y = np.meshgrid(np.linspace(xmin, xmax, n), np.linspace(ymax, ymin, n))

  z = np.zeros_like(x)
  z[(0.3*x**2 <= y) & (y <= 0.3*x**2 + 0.2)] = 1 
  z[(y < -1) & (y > -1.2)] = 1

  np.savetxt("bathymetry.xyz", np.vstack((x.flatten(), y.flatten(), z.flatten())).T)

  q0 = np.full_like(z, 0.5)
  q0[y > 0.3*x**2] = 0
  q0[y < -1] = 0
  np.savetxt("qinit.xyz", np.vstack((x.flatten(), y.flatten(), q0.flatten())).T)

  plt.imshow(z, cmap="inferno")
  q0[q0 <= 0] = float("nan")
  plt.imshow(q0)
  plt.gca().set_xticks((0, n-1), (xmin, xmax))
  plt.gca().set_yticks((0, n-1), (ymax, ymin))
  plt.show()
